CREATE TABLE "Projects" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT (gen_random_uuid()),
    "Name" character varying(300) NOT NULL,
    "TenderNumber" character varying(100),
    "ProjectLeadId" character varying(450),
    "ContractorName" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "ConsultantName" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "Description" character varying(1000),
    "ContractSum" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL,
    "StartDate" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "EndDate" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "Status" character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    "Latitude" double precision NOT NULL,
    "Longitude" double precision NOT NULL,
    "RadiusInMeters" double precision NOT NULL,
    "CurrentPhysicalProgress" numeric(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    "LastProgressUpdate" timestamp with time zone,
    "LastUpdatedById" character varying(450),
    "WardId" uuid NOT NULL,
    "ClusterId" uuid,
    "CreatedAt" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT (NOW()),
    "UpdatedAt" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT (NOW()),
    "CreatedBy" character varying(450) NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedBy" character varying(450) NOT NULL,
    "IsDeleted" boolean NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Projects" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_ContractSum_Positive" CHECK (ContractSum >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_CurrentPhysicalProgress_Range" CHECK (CurrentPhysicalProgress >= 0 AND CurrentPhysicalProgress <= 100),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_EndDateGreaterThanStartDate" CHECK (EndDate >= StartDate),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_RadiusInMeters_Positive" CHECK (RadiusInMeters >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Clusters_ClusterId" FOREIGN KEY ("ClusterId") REFERENCES "Clusters" ("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Users_ProjectLeadId" FOREIGN KEY ("ProjectLeadId") REFERENCES "Users" ("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Wards_WardId" FOREIGN KEY ("WardId") REFERENCES "Wards" ("Id") ON DELETE RESTRICT
);

CREATE TABLE "Projects" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL DEFAULT (gen_random_uuid()),
    "Name" character varying(300) NOT NULL,
    "TenderNumber" character varying(100),
    "ProjectLeadId" character varying(450),
    "ContractorName" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "ConsultantName" character varying(200) NOT NULL,
    "Description" character varying(1000),
    "ContractSum" numeric(18,2) NOT NULL,
    "StartDate" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "EndDate" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "Status" character varying(50) NOT NULL,
    "Latitude" double precision NOT NULL,
    "Longitude" double precision NOT NULL,
    "RadiusInMeters" double precision NOT NULL,
    "CurrentPhysicalProgress" numeric(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    "LastProgressUpdate" timestamp with time zone,
    "LastUpdatedById" character varying(450),
    "WardId" uuid NOT NULL,
    "ClusterId" uuid,
    "CreatedAt" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT (NOW()),
    "UpdatedAt" timestamp with time zone DEFAULT (NOW()),
    "CreatedBy" character varying(450) NOT NULL,
    "UpdatedBy" character varying(450) NOT NULL,
    "IsDeleted" boolean NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Projects" PRIMARY KEY ("Id"),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_ContractSum_Positive" CHECK ("ContractSum" >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_CurrentPhysicalProgress_Range" CHECK ("CurrentPhysicalProgress" >= 0 AND "CurrentPhysicalProgress" <= 100),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_EndDateGreaterThanStartDate" CHECK ("EndDate" >= "StartDate"),
    CONSTRAINT "CK_Project_RadiusInMeters_Positive" CHECK ("RadiusInMeters" >= 0),
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Clusters_ClusterId" FOREIGN KEY ("ClusterId") REFERENCES "Clusters" ("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Users_ProjectLeadId" FOREIGN KEY ("ProjectLeadId") REFERENCES "Users" ("Id") ON DELETE SET NULL,
    CONSTRAINT "FK_Projects_Wards_WardId" FOREIGN KEY ("WardId") REFERENCES "Wards" ("Id") ON DELETE RESTRICT
);
